as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dMPikLQ7WlJBTcQ_ohQu-42" value="<span style="font-size: 14px; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">ACK = 1</span><br style="font-size: 14px; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;"><span
